figures.name: Piye (Piankhi)
figures.title: Conqueror of Egypt
figures.quote: I am a king, divine emanation, living image of Atum...
figures.summary: Napatan king who launched the military campaign that brought Egypt under Cushite control, establishing the 25th Dynasty.

figures.name: Tirhakah
figures.title: The Black Pharaoh
figures.quote: He has set out to fight against you. — 2 Kings 19:9
figures.summary: Most famous of the Kushite pharaohs, he challenged the Assyrian empire and is mentioned in the Bible.

figures.name: Amanirenas
figures.title: Fierce Kandake
figures.quote: A masculine woman, and blind in one eye. — Strabo
figures.summary: Meroitic queen mother who successfully led her forces against the Roman prefect Petronius, forcing a favorable peace treaty.

figures.name: Ezana
figures.title: Christian King of Aksum
figures.quote: By the power of the Lord of Heaven, who in heaven and upon earth is mightier than everything which exists...
figures.summary: Aksumite ruler who conquered Meroe and officially converted his empire to Christianity, altering the region's history.
